ticketCases.title: UI optimization
ticketCases.summary: Large-scale UI refactor surfaced a systematic And-clause omission — the SectionHeader icon And-clause was silently skipped by Engineer, Architect review, and QA before Code Review caught it.
ticketCases.impact: The incident directly catalyzed the per-role retrospective log mechanism: one structural gap, three roles, one process improvement.

ticketCases.title: Visual report script
ticketCases.summary: Automated the visual screenshot pipeline (Playwright → HTML report). Bug Found Protocol triggered three times: module-level side effects, mutable accumulator state, and path traversal via env var.
ticketCases.impact: Demonstrates the four-step Bug Found Protocol: reflect → PM confirms quality → write memory → release fix.

ticketCases.title: 1H MA history fix
ticketCases.summary: 1H predictions silently fell back to 1D MA history, producing incorrect similarity matches. Fixed via test-driven approach: failing test first, production fix second.
ticketCases.impact: Demonstrates test-driven discipline: monkeypatch the internal call, write the failing assertion, confirm it fails, then fix implementation.
